description: CompositionWhite shorts made of 100% polyester, with two side pockets, broad elastic waist and adidas 3-Stripes in dark blue along sidesFittingComfortWash careHand wash or machine washIdeal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, this pair of adidas shorts is made with breathable fabric that wicks away sweat and keeps your dry and fresh, allowing you to focus on your game. Enjoy your fitness activities or simple wear these shorts on relaxing, casual days. The elastic waist provides a comfortable, customised Fit, while the deep side pockets allow you to carry your essentials along, like an ipod or your mobile phone when on the run. Designed for the sporty, the patented adidas 3-Stripes in dark blue stand as a great contrast and reinforce your belief in the brand's aim of high performance.
